items.title: Hyundai E&C, FANCO to collaborate on SMR project
items.blurb: South Korea's Hyundai Engineering & Construction has signed a framework agreement with First American Nuclear Company of the USA for cooperation on the EAGL-1 small modular reactor project.

items.title: Small modular reactor fuel developer Standard Nuclear slashes deal size by 58% ahead of $150 million IPO
items.blurb: Standard Nuclear, which manufactures TRISO fuel for small modular reactors across the US, lowered the proposed deal size for its upcoming IPO on Wednesday.The Oak Ridge, TN-based company now plans to raise $150 million…

items.title: A reactor with no fuel rods and no pellets runs on uranium dissolved into molten salt, a liquid you could pour, at roughly the pressure of the air around you — and it's going into a science building across the street from a student dormitory in West Texas
